Question: Stopping Sight Distance
Choice2: SSD = Stopping sight distance; V = Speed of the vehicle; g = Acceleration due to gravity; f = Coefficient of friction; G = Grade of the road

Question: Length of Spiral Curve
Choice2: L_c = Length of spiral curve; V = Speed of the vehicle(kph); C = Coefficient of lateral friction; R = Radius of the curve

Question: Flow of traffic
Choice2: Q = Flow of traffic (vehicles per hour); k = Density of traffic (vehicles per kilometer); V = Speed of the vehicle (kilometers per hour)

Question: Maximum Free Flow Speed
Choice2: V_max = Maximum free flow speed; V_{free flow speed} = Free flow speed; k = Density of traffic (vehicles per kilometer)

Question: Traffic Density
Choice2: k = Traffic density (vehicles per kilometer); N = Number of vehicles; L = Length of the road segment (kilometers)

Question: Maximum Traffic Density
Choice2: k_{max} = Maximum traffic density; k_{jammed} = Jammed traffic density; V = Speed of the vehicle (kilometers per hour)

Question: Length of Curve(Length > Sight Distance)
Choice2: L_c = Length of curve; G = Grade of the road; S = Sight distance; h_1 = Height of the driver's eye; h_2 = Height of the object

Question: Length of Curve(Length < Sight Distance)
Choice2: L_c = Length of curve; S = Sight distance; h_1 = Height of the driver's eye; h_2 = Height of the object; G = Grade of the road

Question: Peak Hour Factor
Choice2: PHF = Peak Hour Factor; V_{peak hour} = Volume during the peak hour; V_{15 min peak} = Volume during the 15-minute peak period

Question: Design Volume(Hourly)
Choice2: V_{design} = Design volume (vehicles per hour); V = Volume during the peak hour; PHF = Peak Hour Factor
